source: mini_project_hackathon_task_catalog.pdf fields: Task ID, Task title, Feature, Likely hackathon task

tasks.title: Post keyword inverted index
tasks.feature: Search posts by words in topic/title/body without scanning every post.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Build an index that maps each normalized token to the posts containing it.

tasks.title: Message keyword inverted index
tasks.feature: Search comments/messages inside threads.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Index message content and allow global or per-thread search.

tasks.title: Hashtag index
tasks.feature: Find posts/messages tagged with hashtags such as #java or #comp2100.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Extract hashtags and map each tag to matching posts/messages.

tasks.title: Mention index
tasks.feature: Track @username mentions in posts/messages.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Map mentioned username or userId to all mentioning content.

tasks.title: User-to-post index
tasks.feature: Show all posts written by one user on a profile page.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Maintain a mapping from userId to the user’s posts.

tasks.title: User-to-message index
tasks.feature: Show all comments/messages by one user.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Group messages by poster id.

tasks.title: Post timestamp AVL index
tasks.feature: Get newest, oldest, and range of posts by creation time.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Use balanced sorted storage keyed by timestamp and postId.

tasks.title: Message timestamp AVL index
tasks.feature: Keep messages in chronological order for a thread.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Use SortedData<Message> to store messages by timestamp/thread/poster/id.

tasks.title: Post score AVL index
tasks.feature: Maintain posts sorted by votes/replies/activity score.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Remove and reinsert when a score changes to preserve ordering.

tasks.title: Trending post heap
tasks.feature: Return top N active posts efficiently.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Use a priority queue for quick top retrieval; handle score updates carefully.

tasks.title: User karma leaderboard
tasks.feature: Rank users by reputation or karma.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Map users to scores and maintain a sorted leaderboard.

tasks.title: Reaction index
tasks.feature: Track likes/upvotes/downvotes per target.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Prevent duplicate reaction by same user and support reaction type changes.

tasks.title: Vote index with score deltas
tasks.feature: Track +1/-1 votes on posts/messages.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Keep one vote per user per target and compute score efficiently.

tasks.title: Saved posts index
tasks.feature: Let users bookmark posts.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Map each user to a set of saved post ids.

tasks.title: Block and mute index
tasks.feature: Hide content from blocked or muted users.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Map blocker to blocked users and muted topics.

tasks.title: Follow graph
tasks.feature: Represent user follow relationships.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Directed graph where follower -> followee.

tasks.title: Mutual follow recommender
tasks.feature: Suggest users based on follow graph.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Compute candidates followed by people I follow.

tasks.title: Community membership index
tasks.feature: Track which users belong to each community.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Map community id/name to member ids and roles.

tasks.title: Community post feed index
tasks.feature: Store posts inside communities sorted by time/score.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Map community to sorted post collection.

tasks.title: Unread notification queue
tasks.feature: Queue unread notifications per user.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: FIFO queues per user.

tasks.title: Priority notification queue
tasks.feature: Prioritize critical notifications over normal ones.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Higher priority first; timestamp tie-breaker.

tasks.title: Moderation report priority queue
tasks.feature: Process reports by severity and age.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Priority queue of report objects with stable comparator.

tasks.title: Undo moderation stack
tasks.feature: Undo delete/ban/lock actions in reverse order.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Stack of moderation actions.

tasks.title: Post edit history stack
tasks.feature: Store previous versions for reverting edits.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Stack per post id.

tasks.title: Comment thread tree
tasks.feature: Model nested comments/replies.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: General tree plus id-to-node map.

tasks.title: Comment depth-first iterator
tasks.feature: Flatten nested comments in thread order.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Stack-based DFS iterator.

tasks.title: Comment breadth-first iterator
tasks.feature: Traverse comments level by level.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Queue-based BFS iterator.

tasks.title: Message window slice
tasks.feature: Support scrolling through a thread.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Maintain a visible window over sorted messages.

tasks.title: Recent post deque
tasks.feature: Maintain bounded recent activity list.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Deque of recent post ids with capacity.

tasks.title: Direct-message conversation index
tasks.feature: Group private messages by user pair/conversation.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Map conversation key to sorted messages.

tasks.title: Conversation unread queue
tasks.feature: Track unread private messages.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Queue unread messages per user or conversation.

tasks.title: Rate-limit sliding window
tasks.feature: Prevent spam by limiting actions per time window.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Queue timestamps per user; remove expired timestamps.

tasks.title: Duplicate content detector
tasks.feature: Detect repeated post/message content.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Store normalized content hashes.

tasks.title: Autocomplete trie
tasks.feature: Suggest usernames, communities, or keywords by prefix.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Trie/prefix tree.

tasks.title: Hashtag trie with frequency
tasks.feature: Suggest hashtags by prefix and popularity.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Trie nodes with terminal frequency count.

tasks.title: Top-K word counter
tasks.feature: Find most frequent words in posts/messages.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: HashMap counts plus heap for top K.

tasks.title: Feed merge iterator
tasks.feature: Merge several sorted feeds into one global feed.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Priority queue of iterator heads.

tasks.title: Related-post graph
tasks.feature: Connect posts with shared tags, links, or cross-references.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Undirected graph adjacency list.

tasks.title: Post reachability and shortest path
tasks.feature: Find connected discussions through related-post graph.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: BFS/DFS with visited set.

tasks.title: LRU post cache
tasks.feature: Cache recently viewed posts.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: LinkedHashMap or deque plus map.

tasks.title: Session token map
tasks.feature: Map login tokens to users with expiry.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: HashMap token -> session and priority queue by expiry.

tasks.title: Attachment metadata index
tasks.feature: Index attachments by file type, owner, or post.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Maps from owner/post/type to attachment ids.

tasks.title: Pinned post set
tasks.feature: Maintain pinned posts for a community or admin.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Set of pinned post ids plus ordered list.

tasks.title: Draft post store
tasks.feature: Store unsubmitted drafts per user.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Map user to draft ids, sorted by update time.

tasks.title: Runtime object graph traversal engine
tasks.feature: Dynamically discover Message objects from arbitrary runtime object graphs.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Build a recursive traversal engine capable of searching unknown nested structures containing Message objects.

tasks.title: Post id B-tree index
tasks.feature: Search many posts by id with disk-friendly structure.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Simplified B-tree with multi-key nodes.

tasks.title: Timestamp range search service
tasks.feature: Find posts/messages in a time interval.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: AVL range traversal or TreeMap sub-map idea.

tasks.title: Topic co-occurrence graph
tasks.feature: Connect topics that appear together in posts.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Undirected weighted graph.

tasks.title: Reaction persistence
tasks.feature: Save and load likes/reactions.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Create a serializer and data pipeline for reaction records.

tasks.title: Vote persistence
tasks.feature: Save post/message votes.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist one vote per user per target.

tasks.title: Notification persistence
tasks.feature: Save unread/read notifications.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist notifications and read state.

tasks.title: Report persistence
tasks.feature: Save moderation reports.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist report status and metadata.

tasks.title: Follow relationship persistence
tasks.feature: Save follows/subscriptions between users.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist directed graph edges.

tasks.title: Community persistence
tasks.feature: Save community records.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist subreddit/community data.

tasks.title: Community membership persistence
tasks.feature: Save members and roles.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist community-user relationships.

tasks.title: Saved posts persistence
tasks.feature: Save bookmarks.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist user-post saved records.

tasks.title: Block/mute persistence
tasks.feature: Save user block and topic mute lists.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist block relationships and muted topics.

tasks.title: Direct message persistence
tasks.feature: Save private messages.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist direct messages independent of posts.

tasks.title: Conversation metadata persistence
tasks.feature: Save conversation membership and status.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist conversation id and participants.

tasks.title: Nested comment tree persistence
tasks.feature: Save parent-child comment links.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist parentMessageId to reconstruct tree.

tasks.title: Edit history persistence
tasks.feature: Save previous versions of posts/messages.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist append-only versions.

tasks.title: Moderation log persistence
tasks.feature: Save admin actions.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist who did what and when.

tasks.title: User settings persistence
tasks.feature: Save theme, notifications, and privacy settings.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist key-value settings.

tasks.title: Keyword index snapshot
tasks.feature: Save derived keyword index to avoid rebuild cost.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist keyword-target rows or explicitly choose rebuild-on-load.

tasks.title: Hashtag index snapshot
tasks.feature: Save hashtag index and frequencies.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist tag-to-target mappings and counts.

tasks.title: Karma leaderboard snapshot
tasks.feature: Save user karma scores.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist scores or rebuild from votes.

tasks.title: Session persistence
tasks.feature: Save sessions if remember-login is required.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Persist token, user id, expiry time.

tasks.title: Data version header
tasks.feature: Add version/schema information to saved files.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Read version first, then select deserializer or migration path.

tasks.title: Migration from old schema
tasks.feature: Load old saved files into new object model.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Implement a migration from v1 post schema to v2 with extra fields.

tasks.title: Backup snapshot
tasks.feature: Export all application data into one backup.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Write a full snapshot of users, posts, messages, and new feature data.

tasks.title: Atomic save using temp file
tasks.feature: Avoid corrupted saves if writing fails.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Write to temporary file, then rename on success.

tasks.title: JSON formatted factory
tasks.feature: Add JSON format support behind FormattedFactory.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Implement reader/writer compatible with existing DataPipeline abstraction.

tasks.title: XML formatted factory
tasks.feature: Add XML export/import support.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Implement XML reader/writer or export-only view.

tasks.title: Robust CSV escaping
tasks.feature: Improve CSV handling for commas, quotes, and newlines.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Ensure CSVReader/CSVWriter obey escaping rules.

tasks.title: Relationship resolver on load
tasks.feature: Reconnect messages, reactions, and communities after loading.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Load raw objects first, then validate references.

tasks.title: Load order coordinator
tasks.feature: Ensure entities load in dependency order.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Users before posts; posts before messages; relationships after entities.

tasks.title: Missing file policy
tasks.feature: Define what happens if saved file is missing.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask:
Missing optional data file should not crash; missing required file may initialise empty
DAO.

tasks.title: Malformed row policy
tasks.feature: Handle invalid rows consistently.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Reject, skip, or collect errors for malformed saved data.

tasks.title: Data integrity validator
tasks.feature: Validate DAOs after load.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Check uniqueness, foreign keys, and invariants.

tasks.title: Append-only event log
tasks.feature: Persist every action instead of only current state.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Record create post, reply, like, delete, login, etc.

tasks.title: Soft delete persistence
tasks.feature: Persist deleted flag instead of removing records.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Keep deleted posts/messages with deletedAt and deletedBy.

tasks.title: Archive old posts
tasks.feature: Move old posts/messages to archive files.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Write older data to archive while keeping current feed smaller.

tasks.title: Export user data
tasks.feature: Export one user’s posts/messages/settings.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Generate user-specific file for privacy/backup.

tasks.title: Seed data import
tasks.feature: Load initial demo data for testing.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Import users/posts/messages from provided files.

tasks.title: Dirty-flag batch save
tasks.feature: Only save changed DAOs.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Track dirty state and batch write changed files.

tasks.title: Persistence error log
tasks.feature: Log persistent-data failures.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Write errors to a text log.

tasks.title: Schema documentation generator
tasks.feature: Generate human-readable schema docs from serializers.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Each serializer declares columns and types.

tasks.title: Persistence performance benchmark
tasks.feature: Measure save/load time for large datasets.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Use timeout tests and timing output.

tasks.title: DAO for new entity
tasks.feature: Encapsulate storage/access logic for every new model.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Create DAO classes for Reaction, Community, Notification, Report, etc.

tasks.title: Repository layer
tasks.feature: Combine DAO, indexes, and persistence behind a richer interface.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Repository coordinates multiple DAOs and indexes.

tasks.title: Singleton managers
tasks.feature: Ensure single global instance for DAOs/managers.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Apply singleton to managers where duplicate storage would break correctness.

tasks.title: Notification factory
tasks.feature: Create different notification subclasses cleanly.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Factory maps event type to Notification object.

tasks.title: SortedData factory extension
tasks.feature: Switch between AVL, BST, sorted array, or B-tree.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Factory creates implementation without changing DAO code.

tasks.title: Persistence abstract factory
tasks.feature: Switch between CSV, JSON, XML formatted data.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Create reader/writer families for the same format.

tasks.title: Feed ranking strategy
tasks.feature: Swap feed ordering rules.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Encapsulate ranking algorithms.

tasks.title: Search strategy
tasks.feature: Support exact, prefix, any-word, all-word search.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Encapsulate different search modes.

tasks.title: Feed filter strategy
tasks.feature: Filter feed by blocks, community, muted topics, or deleted state.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Each filter is a strategy or specification.

tasks.title: Moderation priority strategy
tasks.feature: Compute report priority differently by policy.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Encapsulate severity rules.

tasks.title: Observer notifications
tasks.feature: Notify subscribers when posts receive replies/likes/mentions.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Subject publishes events; observers create notifications.

tasks.title: Observer trending analytics
tasks.feature: Update trending indexes when content is added.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Trending service listens to new post/message events.

tasks.title: Observer live slice
tasks.feature: Keep visible message window synchronized with sorted data.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: SortedDataSlice observes insertions and updates visible window.

tasks.title: User permission state
tasks.feature: User behaviour depends on Guest/Member/Admin/Banned/etc.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Move permission checks into state objects.

tasks.title: Post lifecycle state
tasks.feature: Post behaviour depends on draft/published/locked/deleted/archived.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: State object controls allowed actions.

tasks.title: Report lifecycle state
tasks.feature: Report moves through Open, UnderReview, Resolved, Dismissed.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: State controls valid transitions and operations.

tasks.title: Feed iterator
tasks.feature: Traverse feed without exposing storage implementation.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Iterator over posts from AVL/map/cache.

tasks.title: Filtered iterator
tasks.feature: Decorate or wrap an iterator to skip hidden items.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Wrap an existing iterator and apply visibility predicate.

tasks.title: Composite comment tree
tasks.feature: Treat post thread and comment nodes uniformly as containers.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Composite nodes can contain child comments.

tasks.title: Moderation command
tasks.feature: Represent delete/ban/lock/resolve as commands.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Command object can execute and undo.

tasks.title: Edit command
tasks.feature: Represent edit/revert operations as commands.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Command allows undo/redo of text edits.

tasks.title: Message renderer decorator
tasks.feature: Add markdown, mention highlight, or profanity filter.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Decorators wrap base renderer.

tasks.title: Feed filter decorator
tasks.feature: Wrap feed provider to add filters dynamically.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Decorators add blocked user, muted topic, and deleted filters.

tasks.title: Backend facade
tasks.feature: Expose simple API for UI/client code.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Hide DAOs, indexes, DataManager, and state transitions behind one class.

tasks.title: Legacy CSV adapter
tasks.feature: Adapt old saved-row schemas to current models.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Adapter converts legacy data to current serializer format.

tasks.title: Formatted data adapter
tasks.feature: Adapt JSON/XML objects to DataPipeline serializer type.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Adapter makes different document formats look like common rows.

tasks.title: Post builder
tasks.feature: Build complex posts with optional fields safely.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Builder avoids huge constructors.

tasks.title: Abstract serializer template
tasks.feature: Share validation/parse skeleton across serializers.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Template method handles common serialize/deserialize steps.

tasks.title: Cached DAO proxy
tasks.feature: Add caching/lazy loading around DAO.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Proxy controls access and caches results.

tasks.title: Null object for empty user/post
tasks.feature: Avoid null checks for unauthenticated or missing entities.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Return safe null-object instead of Java null where appropriate.

tasks.title: Moderation chain of responsibility
tasks.feature: Run content through validation/moderation handlers.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Each handler either passes, flags, or rejects.

tasks.title: Memento for edit history
tasks.feature: Capture previous object state for restore.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Save snapshots of post/message text before mutation.

tasks.title: Visitor for analytics
tasks.feature: Run analytics over posts/messages/comments without changing model classes.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Visitor calculates word count, mention count, or score summary.

tasks.title: Flyweight notification templates
tasks.feature: Reuse immutable notification templates.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Store shared type/message template objects.

tasks.title: Prototype seed data cloning
tasks.feature: Clone template users/posts for generated demo data.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Prototype creates test/demo objects from templates.

tasks.title: Dependency inversion for services
tasks.feature: Services depend on interfaces, not concrete DAOs.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Inject DAO/index interfaces for testability.

tasks.title: Bridge persistence backend
tasks.feature: Separate domain objects from storage implementation.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Abstraction is DataStore; implementation is CSV/JSON/XML.

tasks.title: Specification for validation
tasks.feature: Represent validation rules as reusable objects.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Compose username/password/post validity checks.

tasks.title: Audit observer plus command
tasks.feature: Every command execution emits an audit event.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Combine Command and Observer for audit logging.

tasks.title: Service-layer facade with state checks
tasks.feature: Single service coordinates state, DAO, indexes, and persistence.
tasks.likelyHackathonTask: Facade checks permissions and delegates work.
